title: calophyllum amblyphyllum
intro: Calophyllum amblyphyllum, also known as the Bintangor or Yellow Bintangor, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Calophyllum amblyphyllum include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as calophyllic acid and calophyllic aldehyde. The health benefits of Calophyllum amblyphyllum include its potential to treat various ailments, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. In traditional herbal medicine, Calophyllum amblyphyllum is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical cream, and is also used as an ingredient in traditional remedies for various health conditions.
